# CONTRIBUTING

> First off, thank you for considering contributing to spice-link.

> spice-link is a project and I love to receive contributions from our community — you! There are many ways to contribute, from writing tutorials or blog posts, improving the documentation, submitting bug reports.

> Want to report a issue or give some suggestions?
[Submit a issue](https://github.com/zxdong262/spice-link/issues/new)
